underlying_goal: Understand how far back they can see triaged issues in their Linear project, including historical triage data
friction_detail: Claude initially only showed currently-triaged issues when the user wanted to know about all issues that had ever been in triage.
brief_summary: User wanted to know how far back they could see historically triaged Linear issues; Claude answered the current-state query but confirmed historical triage state queries aren't possible via the API.
